---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem it solves
What problem or limitation does this address? Who would benefit?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you'd like it to work from a user perspective.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, references, or any other context that would help.
